description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized stone with a rugged, angular profile and a predominantly gray coloration interspersed with patches of white and brown mineral deposits. The surface is coarse and uneven, featuring a mix of fine-grained and rougher textures, with visible speckling and mottling throughout. A small, blue rectangular label marked '92' is affixed to one of the flatter surfaces, and a round white sticker is visible on another side, suggesting it may be cataloged or part of a collection. The stone's edges are jagged, and its form is asymmetrical, with no smooth or polished faces. Its mass and density are consistent with granite or a similar igneous rock, making it heavy and solid. The overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to natural weathering, with some discoloration and minor surface pitting.
description: A rugged, gray stone with mottled white and brown patches, rough texture, and catalog labels affixed to its surface.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest, flattest face of the stone with the blue '92' label clearly visible and a mix of gray, white, and brown coloration.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the stone's angular side, with a more pronounced slope and the blue label partially visible on the upper surface.
description_view_2: The stone's longest dimension is visible here, showing a rough, blocky profile with mottled gray and white mineral patterns and the blue label on top.
description_view_3: This view reveals the stone's irregular top surface, both the blue '92' label and a round white sticker are visible, emphasizing its asymmetrical shape.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as an obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Mottled and speckled mineral patterning with irregular patches of white and brown against a gray base; no artificial carvings or regular veining.
attribute_weathering: Rough and slightly pitted, with minor discoloration indicating moderate natural weathering and exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smooth, man-made surfaces but could blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; labels suggest it is not fully integrated into a natural setting.
